nasb.text: He shall then go out from you, he and his sons with him, and shall go back to his family, that he may return to the property of his forefathers.

esv.text: Then he shall go out from you, he and his children with him, and go back to his own clan and return to the possession of his fathers.

cnv.text: 到了禧年，他和他的兒女要離開你，歸回他本家，歸回自己祖宗的地業。

ccb.text: 到了禧年，他和孩子们便可以离开你们，回到自己的宗族和祖业。
